Diary Entry: May 8, 2026
Mood: Pre-meeting jitters.

It’s 1:00 AM. Just finished prepping the deck for the 450+ person corporate meeting tomorrow. I’ve decided to go with the charcoal suit—it’s the only thing that makes me feel ready for a crowd that size.

Spent the evening wrestling with the SignalZero video analysis module. It’s still too heavy for the local build and keeps spiking the CPU. I’m frustrated, but I have to remind myself: the RAG and image understanding are already solid. I’ll demo those and keep the video "in the lab" for now.

Preeti messaged about the SNAGICS packaging update; we need to make a call on the Noida supplier by Monday or we’ll miss the next batch of Lacchadaar Rabdi. My brain is at capacity. I’m just glad this specific note isn’t sitting on a cloud server somewhere—it’s too raw. Time to sleep.
